_setup_instructions.email_step_1: Generate a Gmail App Password: myaccount.google.com → Security → 2-Step Verification → App Passwords → create new (Mail + Windows Computer). Copy the 16-char password.
_setup_instructions.telegram_step_1: Message @BotFather on Telegram → /newbot → follow prompts → copy the bot token.
_setup_instructions.telegram_step_2: Start a chat with your new bot (send it any message).
_setup_instructions.telegram_step_3: Get your chat_id: open https://api.telegram.org/bot<YOUR_TOKEN>/getUpdates in a browser → find the 'id' field under 'chat'.
_setup_instructions.telegram_step_4: Paste both into telegram.bot_token and telegram.chat_id below.
_setup_instructions.run_step: Copy this file to monitor_config.json, fill in your credentials, then run: python scripts/market_monitor.py
_setup_instructions.schedule_step: Schedule via Windows Task Scheduler using the PowerShell commands at the bottom of scripts/market_monitor.py.

_thresholds_note: Adjust thresholds to your preferred sensitivity. Defaults match a Buffett/Munger Austrian investor perspective.
